author: bohdansolovie
title: Corroboration-ranked recall-first multi-language vulnerability miner
notes: Recall-first whole-repo auditor (triage + deep + focused passes + model-free structural probes) with cross-pass corroboration ranking and a localization guard: findings surfaced by multiple passes and tied to a real function/contract are ranked and emitted first, unlocalizable candidates only backfill spare budget. No project-specific or benchmark-specific content.
